title: raoulia rubra
intro: Raoulia rubra, also known as red irongrass, is a perennial succulent plant native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. The red irongrass plant can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, making it a valuable resource for natural remedies.
